name: nuhin13 Claude Plugins

plugins.name: pattern-surgeon
plugins.description: Reactive design-pattern skill. Recommends, applies, and auto-reverts 6 design patterns across 9 language stacks (TS/JS, Python, Java, C#, PHP, Kotlin, Dart, Flutter, Swift). Verify-or-revert safety on every refactor.
